# Actual Prompt

```json
{
  "image_style": "High-quality anime character design, key visual illustration, and character sheet art",
  "visual_elements": {
    "linework": "Clean, precise, and consistent digital line art; uniform weight for outlines and finer details.",
    "coloring": "Soft cell-shading; smooth gradients on hair and clothing to create depth, with defined soft edges on shadows.",
    "character_presentation": "Full-body flat lay on a solid white or transparent background, designed for clarity and detail.",
    "pose": "Standard static standing poses with minimal foreshortening; clear front-facing view.",
    "proportions": "Standard, slightly idealized anime proportions.",
    "lighting": "Even, neutral studio lighting with soft, diffused highlights."
  }
}
```

Using the art style mentioned in the json, generate an anime character using the images as reference.
